element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic forward offensive capability established immediately
Rear defense introduced alongside forward fire
Defensive blocking + supplementary firepower; up to 2 obtainable
Temporary tactical enhancement of blocking effectiveness
Signature series weapon with unique abilities; collected as item
Various special abilities; switchable between default arsenal

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Stage 1 (after Top-View core destruction section completes)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Traditional horizontal shmup gameplay; mainstay of series
Stage completion gate; defeat required to advance

typical_relief_triggers: Destruction of enemy base cores in top-view segments
Transitioning from top-view to side-view (exploratory to combat structure)
typical_tension_triggers: Locating and destroying multiple required enemy base cores
Side-view stage enemy swarms (described as 'packed to the gills with enemy ships')
Weapon loss on ship destruction (reverts to defaults)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Dual-phase structure creates rhythmic tension shifts: exploratory top-view navigation builds tension toward core destruction milestones, then intensifies into packed horizontal combat sequences culminating in boss confrontations

difficulty_curve.early_game: Top-view stages teach navigation and core location; introduction of basic weapons and CRAW mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: CRAW orbit speed boosts and signature Hunter weapon available; side-view stages intensify with enemy density
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters scale in difficulty; weapon variety enables tactical choice
notable_spikes: Transition from exploratory top-view to densely-packed side-view combat
Loss of all special weapons upon ship destruction

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage begins with free-directional overhead navigation (top-view) requiring player to locate and destroy multiple major enemy base cores. Upon completion, stage shifts to horizontal forward-scrolling perspective (side-view) for traditional shmup combat ending in boss fight.
Top-view and side-view segments maintain separate weapon loadouts. Weapon loss in one perspective does not affect the other, allowing strategic weapon preservation across phase transitions.
Side-view stages are 'packed to the gills with enemy ships' leading to 'huge end-of-level guardians,' creating intensity peaks between exploration phases.

sources_used: wikipedia - Thunder Force II gameplay, stage structure, weapon systems, plot context
